semantic.role: Core configuration for the ArchSpine mirror system
responsibilities: File scan and ignore policies (git-tracked, .spineignore, local overrides)
Hook settings for pre-commit and sync mode
Initialization state tracking and agent instruction file management
invariants: MCP contextMode is forced to 'off' (prevents context sharing)
preCommit hook is disabled (false) to avoid unintended interference
scanPolicy.fileSource must be 'git-tracked' to prevent scanning non-repo files
ignoreChain must inherit .gitignore plus project/local ignore files
Protocol exclusions protect .spine/ directories and lock files
Protocol inclusions only allow .spine/rules/ and .spine/config.json from inside .spine/
initState defines which files are managed by ArchSpine and their creation status

English.role: This JSON file serves as the master configuration for the ArchSpine project mirror system. It controls how the system scans files, respects ignore rules, manages hooks, distributes artifacts, and tracks its own initialization state.

parameter_definitions.schemaVersion: Version identifier '1.0.0' ensures backward compatibility and validates configuration structure.
parameter_definitions.project: Defines project metadata: name 'ArchSpine' and supported locales (only 'English').
parameter_definitions.llm: Empty object; no LLM-specific settings configured.
parameter_definitions.mcp.contextMode: Set to 'off' to disable MCP context sharing, preventing unintentional cross-project state exposure.
parameter_definitions.hooks.preCommit: Disabled (false); no pre-commit hook is installed, reducing risk of interfering with workflows.
parameter_definitions.hooks.syncMode: Set to 'hook', meaning sync is triggered via Git hooks rather than manual runs.
parameter_definitions.artifacts.strategy: Set to 'distributable', meaning artifacts are prepared for distribution to environment(s).
parameter_definitions.scanPolicy.fileSource: Only scans files tracked by Git, excluding untracked or generated files from analysis.
parameter_definitions.scanPolicy.ignoreChain: Three-layer ignore chain: inherit global .gitignore, project .spineignore, and local .spineignore.local for maximum flexibility.
parameter_definitions.scanPolicy.protocolExclusions: Explicitly excludes .spine/ directories and common lock files (package-lock, pnpm-lock, yarn.lock, bun.lockb) to avoid clutter and scanning unnecessary dependency records.
parameter_definitions.scanPolicy.protocolInclusions: Overrides exclusion to include .spine/rules/ and .spine/config.json, ensuring critical configuration files are not missed.
parameter_definitions.initState: Comprehensive tracking of initialization flags: which files are managed and whether they were created by ArchSpine or externally. Also lists injected package scripts (spine:init, sync, check, fix).

English.stability_and_risks: This configuration is critical for system stability. The ignore chain prevents scanning of irrelevant or dangerous files. Disabling MCP context and pre-commit hooks reduces complexity and unintended side effects. Protocol exclusions protect internal directories and lock files, while inclusions ensure key config files are scanned. The initState provides a reliable mechanism for tracking managed files, preventing overwrites of externally created files. The only risk is misconfiguration of ignore paths leading to missing important files or scanning sensitive data; however, the layered ignore system with local overrides minimizes human error.
